title: Founder And External Tester Feedback Triage

scope.goal: Turn stable handoff, external tester, workflow feedback, and no-context blind review findings into current fixes or roadmap-backed follow-up work.

stable_handoff.finding: Stable smoke passed, but the git-enabled fixture warning needed tester-facing explanation.

external_tester_onboarding.finding: Live onboarding output now records visible response and feedback response marker evidence.

workflow_feedback_artifacts.finding: Recent feedback artifacts exposed a false synthetic missing classification for no-gap feedback and older records without modern context fields.

no_context_blind_review.finding: Two fresh no-context reviewers found output-contract, setup, roadmap-drift, missing-capability, and overfitting-risk items.

live_v1_acceptance.finding: Release-candidate V1 acceptance passed through localhost model, workflow-router gateway, controller, AnythingLLM, and both frozen fixtures after feedback-contract tightening.

grouped_issues.summary: Natural feedback text with an explicit no-gap segment such as 'missing: none for V1 acceptance' was recorded as a missing item.
grouped_issues.next_action: Keep the corrected useful-only no-gap feedback contract and reject synthetic missing classifications in V1 acceptance.

grouped_issues.summary: Onboarding validation previously proved run IDs and artifacts but not chat-visible response markers for immediate tester review.
grouped_issues.next_action: Keep visible_response and feedback_response evidence with marker checks, SHA-256 hashes, and bounded text samples.

grouped_issues.summary: The Bash-side git-enabled frozen fixture can report a dirty working tree from line-ending behavior even when watched protected hashes are unchanged.
grouped_issues.next_action: Keep the warning documented as non-blocking when watched hashes and protected fixture checks remain unchanged.

grouped_issues.owner_component: controlled small-change apply and implementation workflow bridge
grouped_issues.summary: Tester feedback repeatedly asks for exact packet operations to be generated from an approved investigation instead of requiring manual packet construction.
evidence_refs: no-context blind review finding from Huygens
grouped_issues.next_action: Implement in Phase 96 after Phase 95 context retrieval hardening; do not pull this into Phase 92.

grouped_issues.summary: Older workflow-feedback records lack modern feedback_context, parsed classifications, next_action, and route-decision links.
evidence_refs: no-context blind review finding from Huygens
grouped_issues.next_action: Treat legacy records as historical context, not release-pass evidence; do not hydrate old artifacts unless Phase 93 backlog proves value.

grouped_issues.owner_component: prompt catalogs and skill selection stability
grouped_issues.summary: Current proof is strongest for known L1/L2 fixtures and ONB-001; broader prompt diversity is still needed for natural-language robustness.
grouped_issues.next_action: Expand prompt-gap backlog in Phase 93 and add repeated-run selection stability in Phase 94.

rejected_issues.summary: A possible protected fixture mutation concern was raised by blind review.
rejected_issues.rejection_reason: Rejected as unsupported by deterministic evidence. The live reports passed protected fixture checks; watched hashes for protected fixture files stayed unchanged.

validation_summary.protected_fixture_status: unchanged watched hashes; git-enabled fixture line-ending warning documented
